limitations.title: Maximum structural weights (TAXI/MTOW/MLW/MZFW)
limitations.value: As specified in the LIM chapter

limitations.title: Maximum speeds per flap/slat configuration
limitations.value: As specified on cockpit placard and PFD

limitations.title: Maximum crosswind — manual landing (dry, gusts included)
HP Ground Unit limitation
limitations.value: Do not use bleed air from APU BLEED and HP Air Start Unit at the same time

limitations.title: Minimum AP height — takeoff
limitations.value: 100 ft AGL, and at least 5 sec after lift-off

limitations.title: Minimum AP height — ILS CAT1 / APPR1
Minimum AP height — Go Around engagement
Minimum AP height — all other phases
CAT 2/3 ILS maximum winds
limitations.value: H/W 38 kt · TW 10 kt · XW 30 kt
limitations.note: Based on tower-reported surface wind. If ND exceeds limits but tower is within, AP can remain engaged.

limitations.title: AP/FD in OPEN DES or DES mode
limitations.value: Not permitted if selected altitude below 500 ft or MDA(H)/DA(H), whichever is higher

limitations.title: RNP APCH without GPS PRIMARY
limitations.value: Not authorized — at least 1 GPS required

limitations.title: NAV mode in terminal area prerequisites
limitations.value: GPS PRIMARY available, or HIGH accuracy with RNP checked, or crosscheck with raw data

limitations.title: AP for Non-Precision Approach — one engine inop
Alert Height — CAT 3 Fail Operational (Dual) ILS
Maximum fuel imbalance (inner/outer tanks)
limitations.value: As specified in the LIM Chapter

limitations.title: Minimum fuel temperature
limitations.value: As specified in the LIM Chapter

limitations.title: Minimum fuel quantity for takeoff
limitations.value: If transfer tank not empty: ensure > 4,000 kg in each feed tank before pushback

limitations.title: Certified fuel types
limitations.value: JET A, JET A1, and as specified in LIM Chapter

limitations.title: Maximum brake temperature for takeoff
limitations.note: Pilots MUST NOT commence takeoff if exceeded. Delaying L/G retraction to reduce brake temp IS NOT an approved procedure.

limitations.title: Taxi with deflated/damaged tires
limitations.value: Max speed 3 kt · NSW angle 30° · Up to 9 tires deflated
limitations.note: Max per gear: 1 nose, 2 body (not same axle), 2 wing (not same axle). For runway vacating only, same axle permitted.

limitations.title: Minimum oxygen for flight
limitations.value: As specified in LIM Chapter tables

limitations.title: Loss of cabin pressure — mask regulator assumed position
limitations.note: Times based on sealed mask. May be shorter for bearded crew.

limitations.title: Smoke protection duration — 100% O₂
limitations.note: Based on sealed mask. May be shorter for bearded crew.

limitations.title: APU with OIL LEVEL LO advisory
limitations.value: May start and operate. Maintenance required within 14 hours.

limitations.title: Consecutive APU start attempts
limitations.value: 3 attempts (duty cycles), 60 sec between each, 60 min cool down after third

limitations.title: Maximum APU EGT
limitations.value: Red line limit on EGT scale

limitations.title: Maximum altitude — APU start batteries only (ELEC EMER CONFIG)
Maximum altitude — APU bleed single pack
Maximum altitude — APU bleed dual pack
Maximum altitude — APU bleed for engine start
APU fuel consumption — ground, both pack + gen ON
APU fuel consumption — ground, gen only
Minimum engine oil quantity
limitations.note: Per OM-A 8.1.7.7 — minimum quantity plus estimated consumption

limitations.title: Maximum EGT — any phase
limitations.value: Red line limit on EGT scale

limitations.title: Engine starter limitations
limitations.value: 3 attempts × 5 min, 2 min cool between. After 15 min accumulated: 30 min cool down.
limitations.note: Tailwind > 25 kt may adversely affect start. May need to reposition into wind.

limitations.title: Reverse thrust limitations
limitations.value: In-flight: PROHIBITED · Backing: not permitted · Max reverse below 70 kt: not permitted · Idle reverse: allowed to stop
